title: Filipino-Style Fried Shrimp with Garlic Fried Rice
description: A classic Filipino dish that combines crispy fried shrimp with aromatic garlic fried rice. This dish is quick, easy, and flavorful.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and sauté for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the shrimp and cook for 2-3 minutes per side until pink and cooked through.
Remove the shrimp from the pan and set aside.
In the same pan, add the cooked rice and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes until lightly browned.
Add the egg to the pan and scramble it with the rice.
Add the cooked shrimp back to the pan and stir-fry for another minute.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
